data.title: American Eagle Gold Secures C$23 Million Sprott-Backed Financing, Bolstering NAK Exploration War Chest
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

American Eagle Gold ( (TSE:AE) ) has provided an update.

American Eagle Gold has closed a C$23.04 million non-brokered premium flow-through share placement backed by Eric Sprott, who acquired a 9.9% equity stake, adding a third major strategic investor alongside South32 and Teck. A concurrent C$10.9 million flow-through financing with South32 and Teck is expected to close in early April, leaving the company with more than C$55 million in cash to fund substantial drilling expansions at its NAK project through 2027, reinforcing both its exploration plans and its institutional shareholder base.

The offerings, structured as flow-through shares under Canadian tax rules, will be directed to qualifying exploration expenditures on the company’s Canadian mineral properties, with no warrants attached and subject to regulatory approvals including from the TSX Venture Exchange. The strengthened balance sheet and continued support from three prominent sector investors are set to enhance American Eagle’s financial flexibility, execution capacity at NAK, and visibility within the mining investment community.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AE) stock is a Hold with a C$0.85 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on American Eagle Gold stock, see the TSE:AE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AE is a Neutral.

The score is constrained primarily by weak financial performance typical of a pre-revenue explorer (no revenue, rising losses, and significant negative operating/free cash flow), implying continued reliance on financing. This is partly offset by a low-debt balance sheet and stronger equity capitalization, while technicals are currently strong but show overbought risk. Valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on AE stock, click here.

More about American Eagle Gold

American Eagle Gold Corp. is a Toronto-based mineral exploration company focused on advancing its NAK copper-gold project in Canada. The company targets critical mineral discoveries and attracts strategic backing from major mining groups, positioning it within the exploration segment of the base and precious metals sector.

Average Trading Volume: 391,495

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$181.7M

Find detailed analytics on AE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Guardian Metal debuts on NYSE American to advance Nevada tungsten assets
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Golden Metal Resources Plc ( (GB:GMET) ) just unveiled an update.

Guardian Metal Resources, a Nevada-focused tungsten exploration company, has begun trading on the NYSE American under the ticker GMTL, adding to its existing London and OTC listings. The company’s leadership will mark the milestone by ringing the NYSE American Closing Bell, underscoring its growing presence in U.S. capital markets.

Management expects the U.S. listing to support advancement of its key Pilot Mountain and Tempiute tungsten projects, which it views as strategically positioned to bolster domestic critical mineral supply chains. The move is intended to enhance access to U.S. investors and capital, potentially strengthening Guardian Metal’s role in the emerging U.S. tungsten supply network.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:GMET) stock is a Hold with a £226.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Golden Metal Resources Plc stock, see the GB:GMET Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GMET Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GMET is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (minimal revenue, widening losses, and sharply higher cash burn) despite a debt-free balance sheet. Technicals are supportive due to a strong uptrend, but overbought momentum readings raise pullback risk. Valuation provides limited support given negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on GMET stock, click here.

More about Golden Metal Resources Plc

Guardian Metal Resources is a U.S.-focused, exploration-stage mining company specialising in tungsten projects in Nevada. Founded in 2021, it is developing the Pilot Mountain and Tempiute assets, both located in historic tungsten districts with prior mining activity and mineralised occurrences, aiming to underpin a secure, vertically integrated U.S. tungsten supply chain.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.description:

Green Energy Group Limited ( (HK:0979) ) has provided an update.

Green Energy Group Limited has agreed to sell a piece of German real estate and certain related assets in two connected transactions to entities associated with director Mr. Pek. The deals involve a property sale for EUR565,000 and an asset sale for EUR80,000, together equivalent to about HK$6.04 million.

Because the purchasers are associates of Mr. Pek, the transactions are aggregated under Hong Kong Listing Rules, making them discloseable deals with at least one percentage ratio above 5% but below 25%. The disposals, subject to specified payment conditions and German land registry procedures, represent a modest balance-sheet reshaping that triggers notification and announcement requirements but not shareholder approval.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0979) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Green Energy Group Limited stock, see the HK:0979 Stock Forecast page.

More about Green Energy Group Limited

Green Energy Group Limited, incorporated in Bermuda and listed in Hong Kong, operates in the broader green energy and related asset sector. The company’s activities include holding and managing real estate and operational assets that support its business, with transactions often structured under Hong Kong’s Listing Rules framework for discloseable deals.

data.title: FVCBankcorp Extends Share Repurchase Program Through 2027
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

FVCBankcorp ( (FVCB) ) has issued an update.

On March 19, 2026, FVCBankcorp, Inc. said its board had extended the share repurchase program first launched in 2020, authorizing buybacks of up to 1.4 million common shares, or about 8% of stock outstanding as of Dec. 31, 2025. The program, which allows repurchases via open‑market trades, block deals or private transactions, is scheduled to run until March 31, 2027, unless the board ends it earlier.

Repurchased shares will be cancelled and returned to authorized but unissued status, potentially boosting per‑share metrics for remaining investors and signaling confidence in the company’s valuation. Management retains broad discretion over timing and volume of buybacks based on market conditions, capital needs and alternative uses of cash, and the program can be modified, suspended or terminated at any time with no obligation to repurchase any minimum amount.

The most recent analyst rating on (FVCB) stock is a Buy with a $17.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on FVCBankcorp stock, see the FVCB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FVCB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FVCB is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by the weak/uncertain 2025 cash-flow picture and profitability volatility, despite clear balance-sheet improvement and steady revenue growth. Technicals are supportive but appear overbought, while valuation is reasonable and the recent notes offering is a mixed signal (added capital flexibility but higher debt cost).

To see Spark’s full report on FVCB stock, click here.

More about FVCBankcorp

FVCBankcorp, Inc. is the holding company for FVCbank, a $2.29 billion Virginia‑chartered community bank based in Fairfax, Va., serving commercial businesses, nonprofit organizations and professional service firms in the greater Baltimore and Washington, D.C., metropolitan areas. The locally owned bank, founded in 2007, operates eight full‑service offices across Northern Virginia, Washington, D.C., Baltimore and Bethesda, Md.

The institution focuses on providing banking services to business owners and their employees, positioning itself as a regional community lender in the Mid‑Atlantic market. Its footprint and client base emphasize relationship banking for commercial and nonprofit customers rather than mass‑market retail banking.

Average Trading Volume: 46,091

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $262M

See more insights into FVCB stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: China Boqi Environmental Lifts 2025 Profit, Margins and Dividend Payout
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

China Boqi Environmental (Holding) Co., Ltd. ( (HK:2377) ) has issued an update.

China Boqi Environmental reported a modestly improved set of results for 2025, with revenue rising 3.7% year-on-year to RMB2.23 billion and gross profit climbing 13.6% to RMB494 million, lifting gross margin to 22.2%. Net profit inched up 1.7% to RMB244 million, keeping net margin broadly flat at 10.9%, indicating improved operating efficiency but also higher costs and investment in areas such as research and development.

The board proposed a higher final dividend of HK6.40 cents per share, up from HK4.60 cents a year earlier, signalling confidence in the group’s cash generation and earnings stability despite only modest profit growth. The results underscore China Boqi Environmental’s ability to maintain profitability and enhance shareholder returns in a competitive environmental services market, supported by steady demand for industrial emission control solutions and disciplined cost management.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2377) stock is a Hold with a HK$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Boqi Environmental (Holding) Co., Ltd. stock, see the HK:2377 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Boqi Environmental (Holding) Co., Ltd.

China Boqi Environmental (Holding) Co., Ltd. operates in the environmental services industry, focusing on pollution control solutions and related engineering and operational services in mainland China. The group primarily serves power and industrial clients, providing comprehensive emission treatment technologies and long-term operation and maintenance services to support cleaner production and regulatory compliance.

Average Trading Volume: 110,131

data.title: Rhythm Wins FDA Nod for Hypothalamic Obesity Therapy
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Rhythm Pharmaceuticals ( (RYTM) ) is now available.

On March 19, 2026, Rhythm Pharmaceuticals reported that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration approved an expanded indication for its MC4R agonist IMCIVREE (setmelanotide) to treat acquired hypothalamic obesity in adults and children aged four and older. Acquired hypothalamic obesity is a rare condition often following hypothalamic tumors or injury, and Rhythm estimates about 10,000 affected patients in the U.S., underscoring a concentrated but meaningful commercial niche.

The expanded label makes IMCIVREE the first and only FDA-approved therapy specifically for acquired hypothalamic obesity, potentially strengthening Rhythm’s leadership in rare obesity disorders and filling a critical treatment gap for patients facing relentless hunger and rapid, sustained weight gain. Approval was based on the global Phase 3 TRANSCEND trial in 142 patients, where setmelanotide achieved an 18.4% placebo-adjusted reduction in BMI and was generally well tolerated, and the company plans immediate U.S. availability supported by its Rhythm InTune patient services program.

The most recent analyst rating on (RYTM) stock is a Buy with a $149.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rhythm Pharmaceuticals stock, see the RYTM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RYTM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RYTM is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improving commercial traction and strong gross margins alongside a low-debt balance sheet, but it is held back by ongoing cash burn and losses. Technicals remain weak with the stock below key moving averages and negative momentum, while near-term outlook is mixed given higher 2026 spending guidance and mixed Phase 3 expansion data despite supportive AHO regulatory/clinical catalysts.

To see Spark’s full report on RYTM stock, click here.

More about Rhythm Pharmaceuticals

Rhythm Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a Boston-based commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on rare neuroendocrine diseases, particularly severe obesity driven by dysfunction in the MC4R pathway. Its lead drug, IMCIVREE (setmelanotide), is approved in the U.S., European Union and U.K. for certain forms of syndromic and monogenic obesity, and the company is advancing additional MC4R agonists and programs in congenital hyperinsulinism.

Rhythm targets niche populations with high unmet medical need, such as patients with Bardet-Biedl syndrome and POMC, PCSK1 or LEPR deficiency, aiming to build a franchise in rare obesity disorders. By expanding indications for IMCIVREE and progressing its pipeline, the company is positioning itself as a specialized player in the rare endocrine and metabolic disease market.

Average Trading Volume: 715,185

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $6.17B

For a thorough assessment of RYTM stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Tong Ren Tang Subsidiary Posts Lower 2025 Profit as Revenue and Margins Decline
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Tong Ren Tang Technologies Co ( (HK:1666) ) has provided an update.

Tong Ren Tang Technologies reported that its subsidiary Beijing Tong Ren Tang Chinese Medicine Company Limited posted lower revenue and profit for 2025, with sales falling to HK$1.51 billion from HK$1.61 billion and profit attributable to owners dropping to HK$397.2 million from HK$500.3 million. The decline was driven by reduced gross profit, higher impairment losses on financial assets, and weaker contributions from equity-accounted investments, though the group also trimmed distribution and administrative expenses, suggesting efforts to manage costs amid a more challenging operating environment.

The subsidiary’s consolidated gross profit decreased to HK$925.6 million from HK$1.07 billion, and basic earnings per share slipped to HK$0.47 from HK$0.60 year-on-year. These results indicate margin pressure and softer demand compared with 2024, which may weigh on Tong Ren Tang Technologies’ consolidated performance and signal a more cautious outlook for investors tracking the traditional Chinese medicine sector’s growth trajectory.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1666) stock is a Hold with a HK$4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tong Ren Tang Technologies Co stock, see the HK:1666 Stock Forecast page.

More about Tong Ren Tang Technologies Co

Tong Ren Tang Technologies Co. Ltd. operates in the traditional Chinese medicine industry through its subsidiary Beijing Tong Ren Tang Chinese Medicine Company Limited, which is listed in Hong Kong. The group focuses on manufacturing and selling Chinese medicine products in domestic and overseas markets, positioning itself as a key player in branded herbal remedies and healthcare formulations.

Average Trading Volume: 1,124,023

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$5.3B

data.title: Chilean Cobalt Refreshes Board Ahead of Potential Uplisting
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Chilean Cobalt Corp. ( (COBA) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 19, 2026, Chilean Cobalt Corp. appointed veteran capital markets executives Michael Caperonis and Tom Diffely to its board of directors, with both expected to serve on the audit committee. The pair, described as long-time supporters and significant shareholders, add deep equity and institutional finance expertise as the company positions its cobalt, copper and rare earth assets for broader investor exposure.

That same day, founding director and audit committee chair Greg Levinson resigned from the board to pursue new ventures, though he will remain a supportive shareholder. The board realignment is intended to bolster independence and governance as Chilean Cobalt evaluates a possible future uplisting to a national securities exchange, a move that could enhance access to capital and strengthen its standing in the critical minerals sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (COBA) stock is a Buy with a $1.28 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Chilean Cobalt Corp. stock, see the COBA Stock Forecast page.

More about Chilean Cobalt Corp.

Chilean Cobalt Corp. is a U.S.-based critical minerals exploration and development company focused on the La Cobaltera cobalt-copper project in northern Chile, one of the world’s few primary cobalt districts. The company is also advancing the El Cofre cobalt-copper and NeoRe rare earth projects, aiming to create ecological, social, economic and financial value for stakeholders in Chile and its shareholders.

Operating on the OTCQB under ticker COBA, Chilean Cobalt targets the growing market for energy transition and critical minerals through early-stage project development. Its strategy centers on expanding access to capital markets to fund project advancement while strengthening corporate governance and board independence ahead of a potential future uplisting to a national securities exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 16,969

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

See more data about COBA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
